Data structures, drivers, system functions, utilities, tests, DSP functions, build tools, and scripts for STM32F4 Silk platform bootloader.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Data structures, drivers, system functions, utilities, boot tests, firmware handling, and linker script for STM32F4 Silk platform.
- **[test](test/README.md)**: Tests for system flash operations, including erase and write functionalities, with error handling.
- **[vendor](vendor/README.md)**: Digital signal processing functions for ARM Cortex-M processors and build configuration script for STM32F412xG.
- **[waftools](waftools/README.md)**: Tools for creating C headers, extracting Git info, processing linker scripts, and converting files.

## Files
- **[boot-bin-update.sh](boot-bin-update.sh.md)**: A Bash script to update bootloader binaries for the "silk" board in the Pebble firmware.
- **[desym.sh](desym.sh.md)**: Executes `arm-none-eabi-addr2line` to map addresses to line numbers in `tintin_boot.elf`.
- **[flash](flash.md)**: Bash script to flash a bootloader binary using OpenOCD.
- **[gdb](gdb.md)**: A script to start GDB with OpenOCD for debugging the tintin_boot.elf file.
- **[openocd_swd_ftdi.cfg](openocd_swd_ftdi.cfg.md)**: Configuration for OpenOCD to use FTDI interface with SWD protocol and LED control.
- **[run-tests.sh](run-tests.sh.md)**: A shell script to compile and run tests for the Pebble firmware using the Clar testing framework.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build configuration script for the Silk bootloader, specifying options, compiler settings, and build targets.
